title: abies sibirica subsp. sibirica
intro: Abies sibirica subsp. sibirica, also known as the Siberian fir, is a subspecies of evergreen tree native to the mountainous regions of eastern Russia and northeastern China. Its medicinal properties include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which are derived from its essential oils, particularly alpha-pinene and bornyl acetate. The health benefits of Abies sibirica subsp. sibirica include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve overall immune function. Herbal preparations of Abies sibirica subsp. sibirica include infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to make teas, salves, and aromatherapy products.
